FAQ

Features

bioAF is a complete platform for computational biology at small biotech companies. Here’s what’s included.

Core capabilities

  • Experiment Management — MINSEQE-compliant metadata, sample tracking, full status lifecycle
  • Pipeline Engine — Run Nextflow and Snakemake workflows with real-time monitoring
  • Notebook Sessions — JupyterHub and RStudio with versioned environments
  • Results & Visualization — cellxgene, QC dashboards, and a searchable plot archive
  • Data Management — File upload, download, and automatic lifecycle management
  • Cost Center — Cloud spending visibility, per-component breakdown, budget alerts
  • Audit & Compliance — Immutable audit trail with full provenance
  • Infrastructure Management — Enable and disable platform components from the UI

Free and open source computational biology infrastructure.
